version_pin_rationale: libxcb1 1.14-3ubuntu3 is the jammy release build. XCB base library all xcb-* family libs (including the libxcb-extras catalog) chain off. Mesa's xcb-egl path links it; wlroots' Xwayland-bridge integration links it. THIS WAS THE HIDDEN DE0-G DEP CALLED OUT BY THE DE0-G REPORT (the report said 'libxcb-* transitive deps' meaning the xcb family; libxcb1 itself is the root). Catalog tier intentionally isolates libxcb1 from the libxcb-extras umbrella catalog so the dependency_closure[] graph stays accurate (all libxcb-* depend on libxcb1, not on each other).
